headline: Standardizing AI Coding with Agent Skills
lede: This framework moves beyond raw code generation by imposing disciplined engineering constraints on AI agents. By mapping 23 modular skills to the development lifecycle, it enforces test-driven development and consistent quality gates across modern AI platforms.

headline: Codifying Strategy with PM Skills Marketplace
lede: Why rely on static textbooks when your AI can run an opportunity solution tree? This project transforms abstract product management methodologies into actionable, chained commands that guide strategic decision-making in real-time.

headline: Tolaria Maintains Git-Based Knowledge Archives
lede: Tolaria embraces the local-first philosophy by treating your second brain as a collection of plain text files. Its Git-centric design ensures that your data remains under your total control, free from the constraints of proprietary cloud silos.

headline: Tracking Digital Sentiment with Last30Days
lede: Traditional search engines are failing to capture the pulse of the web. This tool bypasses algorithmic bias by synthesizing engagement metrics from prediction markets and social platforms to reveal what is actually trending right now.

headline: Automating Username Research with Maigret
lede: Stop manually mapping digital footprints across disparate social platforms. Maigret turns tedious investigative legwork into an automated, proxy-aware process that consolidates identity data into structured, professional reports.

headline: Unpacking System Prompts for AI Coding Assistants
lede: This archive peels back the curtain on the instructional logic governing today's leading AI development environments. Researchers can now study the specific directives and metadata that shape how agents interpret context and manage software projects.

headline: Superpowers Framework Hardens AI Coding Agents
lede: Superpowers provides a scalable layer of rigor for AI agents, forcing them to perform systematic debugging and mandatory self-reviews. It creates a robust, production-grade environment where coding assistants function as predictable team members rather than simple text generators.

headline: Tunneling Traffic via MasterDnsVPN
lede: Security requires resilience against increasingly sophisticated network firewalls. By encapsulating data within standard DNS queries and utilizing advanced packet-loss management, this tool provides a stable, hidden channel for information freedom.

headline: MoneyPrinterTurbo Scales Video Content Production
lede: Automate your video pipeline from script generation to final render with this flexible platform. It integrates diverse LLM providers to transform your creative prompts into polished, multi-format media assets with minimal manual intervention.

headline: Running High-Performance Clinical NLP Locally
lede: Privacy-conscious healthcare demands data that never reaches the cloud. OpenMed delivers high-performance entity extraction models optimized for local hardware, ensuring that sensitive patient information remains secure while maintaining full clinical accuracy.
